summary: Social Feed Wall View Enhancement testing complete. All features working: Wall View (default) with 4 panels for prioritized handles, Feed View with 20 handle chips, Ticker View with P1-P4 priority badges, AI Analyze panel, swap dropdown, collapse/expand. Backend returns 20 handles with TruthTrumpPosts added as P4 with 'political' category.

minor.issue: Slow response time (up to 60s) when LLM not available - falls back to keyword analysis. This is expected behavior.

issues: Twitter embed timelines show 'Loading @handle...' state - Twitter widgets.js may not load in container environment. Fallback 'Open on X' link is provided.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 4 prioritized handles with priority field: faststocknewss(P1), Deltaone(P2), unusual_whales(P3), TruthTrumpPosts(P4)
VERIFIED: POST /api/social-feed/analyze returns sentiment analysis with keyword fallback (MOCKED AI)
VERIFIED: Wall View is default with data-testid='social-feed-wall'
VERIFIED: 4 wall panels: wall-panel-faststocknewss, wall-panel-Deltaone, wall-panel-unusual_whales, wall-panel-TruthTrumpPosts
VERIFIED: Feed View shows 20 handle chips with data-testid='handle-chip-{handle}'
VERIFIED: Ticker View shows 20 ticker cards with P1-P4 priority badges
VERIFIED: Each wall panel has swap dropdown (data-testid='panel-swap-{handle}')
VERIFIED: Swap dropdown shows 17 available options (excludes current 4 wall handles + current panel)
VERIFIED: Swap functionality works - successfully swapped faststocknewss to TheShortBear
VERIFIED: AI Analyze toggle opens/closes panel with input and submit button
VERIFIED: Category colors include 'political' (#dc2626) for TruthTrumpPosts

success_rate.backend: 100% (GET /api/social-feed/handles returns 20 handles with correct structure, POST /api/social-feed/analyze works with keyword fallback)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Wall/Feed/Ticker views, swap dropdown, AI Analyze, collapse/expand all working)

seed_data_creation: None - uses DEFAULT_HANDLES from backend service (auto-reseeds when handle count changes 19->20)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Feed Widget Wall View enhancement complete. Backend event loop saturation from IB Gateway causes intermittent API timeouts - known container issue. AI sentiment analysis uses keyword-based fallback when Ollama/LLM not available (MOCKED). Twitter embed timelines may not load in container - 'Open on X' fallback provided.
mocked_api_note: AI sentiment analysis falls back to keyword-based analysis when Ollama/LLM not available. This is expected behavior.
